label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out how many penguins are less than 8 years old and weigh less than 12 kg. Let's start by going through each penguin one by one. First, the table has four penguins: Louis, Bernard, Vincent, and Gwen. Let me list out their details again to make sure I have them right. Louis: age 7, height 50 cm, weight 11 kg. Bernard: age 5, height 80 cm, weight 13 kg. Vincent: age 9, height 60 cm, weight 11 kg. Gwen: age 8, height 70 cm, weight 15 kg. The question is asking for penguins that are both less than 8 years old AND weigh less than 12 kg. So I need to check both conditions for each penguin. Starting with Louis. His age is 7, which is less than 8. His weight is 11 kg, which is less than 12. So Louis meets both conditions. That's one. Next, Bernard. Age is 5, which is less than 8. His weight is 13 kg. Wait, 13 is more than 12, so he doesn't meet the weight condition. So Bernard is out. Only age condition met, not both. Vincent is next. His age is 9. Oh, 9 is more than 8, so he doesn't meet the age condition. Even though his weight is 11 kg, which is under 12, since his age is over 8, he doesn't count. So Vincent is out. Gwen is 8 years old. The condition is less than 8, so 8 is not less than 8. So her age doesn't meet the requirement. Her weight is 15 kg, which is way over 12, so she's out on both counts. So the only one that meets both conditions is Louis. Wait, but let me check again. Did I miss anyone else? Wait, the options include up to 4, but there are four penguins. Let me make sure I didn't misread any numbers. Louis: age 7 (yes, under 8), weight 11 (under 12) → yes. Bernard: age 5 (under 8), weight 13 (over 12) → no. Vincent: age 9 (over 8), weight 11 (under 12) → no because age is over 8. Gwen: age 8 (not under 8), weight 15 → no. So only Louis meets
